obligations.statement: Rewrite the critical-point singularity definition as exact uniform inequalities and separate assumptions from examples and asserted consequences.
obligations.disposition: The exact rewrite is in the proof map. A globally bounded fixed-centre factor Phi implies localization and weak-L(3/2); bare weak-L(3/2) controls neither separated cores nor anisotropic diameter. The proof-minimal repair states uniform high-level localization directly.

obligations.statement: Define vorticity direction on the zero-vorticity set and preserve the required weighted-BMO bound.
obligations.disposition: The theorem must assume one measurable global unit extension satisfying omega-vector=|omega| xi and the uniform weighted-BMO bound. Smooth divergence-free vorticity does not imply such a modulus, and a zero-set choice made after the estimates is not automatic.

obligations.statement: Verify uniform-in-time profile, Lorentz, and weighted-BMO constants on the exact terminal interval.
obligations.disposition: The repaired hypotheses provide fixed profile, Lorentz, localization, and direction constants on I=(T-star-epsilon,T-star). This is assumed conditional uniformity, not a PDE consequence. The source's later phrase 'entire interval' must be read as I; the downstream threshold check remains O2607-10.

obligations.statement: Check the full tensor Biot-Savart formula and exact unidirectional cancellation for the stretching eigenvalue.
obligations.disposition: The indexed principal-value derivation verifies the componentwise commutator and the zero Rayleigh contraction e^T T(|omega|e)e. The source overstates this at line 218: the full unidirectional strain tensor need not vanish.

obligations.statement: Verify the scale-local Jones extension with global BMO seminorm proportional to phi(R).
obligations.disposition: The precise local domain, constants, and treatment of additive means must match CRW.

obligations.statement: Verify vector-valued CRW boundedness on weak Lorentz L(3/2,infinity) by a valid interpolation argument.
obligations.disposition: Endpoint q=infinity must not be inferred from an inapplicable single-space theorem.

obligations.statement: Reproduce the near, middle dyadic, and far tail estimates with exact kernel and norm powers.
obligations.disposition: The target is the localized norm C/|log R| with constants independent of time.

obligations.statement: Justify truncated testing of the scalar vorticity-magnitude inequality under the stated regularity and at vorticity zeros.
obligations.disposition: A smooth approximation or Kato-type argument should make all integrations legal.

obligations.statement: Verify Lorentz real interpolation, Sobolev embedding, Young exponents, and coercive damping.
obligations.disposition: Only downstream exponent arithmetic is mechanized; analytic inequalities remain open.

obligations.statement: Verify a single truncation threshold and all constants remain uniform on the actual pre-singular interval.
obligations.disposition: The source's switch from a terminal interval to the entire interval must be reconciled.

obligations.statement: Invert the logarithmically corrected distribution inequality with explicit cutoffs and one-sided constants.
obligations.disposition: Formal exponents match; a rigorous slowly-varying inversion lemma is still required.

obligations.statement: Verify the exact O'Neil convolution bound, whole-space tail, and transfer of the logarithmic exponent from vorticity to velocity.
obligations.disposition: The exponent checker assumes this analytic mapping and does not prove it.

obligations.statement: Prove quantitative 3D-to-1D sparseness at a usable scale for every spatial center.
obligations.disposition: Global volume control must yield an explicit chosen radius, not sparseness at every smaller radius.

obligations.statement: Synchronize escape time, evaluation time below T-star, local lifespan, and analytic radius without circular extension.
obligations.disposition: This is a theorem-critical temporal quantifier check.

obligations.statement: Verify slit-domain harmonic measure, boundary hypotheses, complexified velocity bounds, and phase handling.
obligations.disposition: The domain should be stated as the analytic disk with the good real set removed.

obligations.statement: Repair the stray source character and restate the origin-in-void branch as a pointwise bound feeding the final supremum.
obligations.disposition: Likely presentational, but must be resolved before a clean proof reconstruction.
